articles.title: Man killed in Rexdale apartment shooting, police say
articles.description: Toronto police are investigating after a man was allegedly shot and killed in a Rexdale apartment building on Sunday evening. Officers were called to the area of Queen’s Plate Drive and Rexdale Boulevard at approximately 8 p.m. One man was pronounced dead at the scene. No other details were provided
